problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Monoclonal. Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
